title: Celebrating Romani Culture and Pride
story: Every April 8, people around the world celebrate International Romani Day to honor Romani culture and history. Romani communities share traditional music, dancing, and colorful clothing that tells stories of their heritage. Many people post photos of beautiful Romani art and learn about their contributions to music and literature. It's a day to celebrate diversity and fight against unfair treatment of Romani people everywhere.
activity_question: What do Romani communities traditionally share on International Romani Day?
follow_up_question: What other cultures in your community deserve more recognition and celebration?

title: Draw a Picture of a Bird Day
story: Grab your crayons and get ready to sketch some feathered friends! Every April 8, people celebrate Draw a Picture of a Bird Day by creating artwork featuring their favorite birds. Kids and adults pick up pencils, markers, or paintbrushes to draw everything from tiny hummingbirds to majestic eagles. Some people share their bird drawings on social media, while others hang them on refrigerators or classroom walls. Art teachers love using this day to inspire creativity and teach students about different bird species. Whether you draw a simple stick-figure robin or a detailed parrot, this holiday celebrates both art and nature coming together in one fun activity.
activity_question: What do people use to create their bird artwork on this holiday?
follow_up_question: What's the most interesting bird you've ever seen that you'd like to draw?
